description: CN2 constitutional implementing statutes admitted from the prepared source inventory.
notes: Normalized from prompts/cluster-2-batches/lex-mex-cl2-batch-CN2.json for the repository Rust ingestion gate.
All ten prepared entries were absent from adapters and corpus/mx when this operational manifest was created.
The prepared manifest contains no blocked entries and no expected_edges; none were invented during normalization.
All reference pages and consolidated PDF URLs were verified against the official Cámara de Diputados LeyesBiblio site on 2026-07-15; every PDF returned HTTP 200 with application/pdf.
Instrument order is preserved from the prepared cluster-2 plan.
